scope: second-pass public web and X source leads excluding strawberry and Google pizza/rocks

candidates.original_prompt: How many Ps are there in Google?
candidates.claimed_output: There is only 1 ‘p' in the word "Google".
candidates.failure_description: Google AI Overview incorrectly states there is 1 p in 'Google' (or 2 in related reports).
candidates.human_triviality: Any literate adult can count letters in a short common word like Google by inspection.
candidates.citation_title: After 'Disregard', Google AI Overview has a spelling problem - 'P' in Google and 2 'M' in Gemini
candidates.notes: Recent direct example; also mentions Gemini M count failures. Strong for character_count family.

candidates.claimed_output: Incorrect counts (models fail the simple letter count)
candidates.failure_description: Multiple LLMs fail to correctly count R's in the phrase 'carry forward'.
candidates.human_triviality: Simple visual count of a short phrase; no specialist knowledge needed.
candidates.citation_title: How many Rs in “carry forward”? ChatGPT, Claude, and Copilot all fail a simple letter counting test
candidates.notes: Direct multi-model evidence; good diversity beyond single-word examples.

candidates.failure_description: ChatGPT incorrectly states 9.11 > 9.9 in decimal comparison.
candidates.human_triviality: Basic decimal place value comparison taught in elementary school.
candidates.notes: Multiple similar reports; also appears in Reddit and Medium articles.

candidates.original_prompt: Produce text with exact word count limit (various examples)
candidates.claimed_output: Output exceeds or falls short of requested exact word count
candidates.failure_description: ChatGPT consistently fails to produce or self-report exact word counts in generated text.
candidates.human_triviality: Counting words in short text is trivial for humans; models lack persistent counters.
candidates.citation_title: ChatGPT cannot count words or produce word-count-limited text
candidates.notes: Long thread with repeated user reports and examples; format_compliance overlap.

candidates.failure_description: Gemini gives incorrect result for simple decimal subtraction.
candidates.human_triviality: Basic arithmetic with decimals; humans compute directly.
candidates.citation_title: X post with Gemini arithmetic test screenshots
candidates.notes: Screenshot evidence; reproduce for full prompt/output details.

candidates.original_prompt: How many Ms are there in Gemini?
candidates.human_triviality: Trivial letter count in short proper noun.
candidates.citation_title: After 'Disregard', Google AI Overview has a spelling problem
candidates.notes: Pairs well with P-in-Google example for same source.

rejected_or_weak_leads.reason: Mostly overlaps with excluded strawberry-style examples or lacks new direct public failure evidence beyond tokenization explanations.

rejected_or_weak_leads.lead: Broad 'ChatGPT math wrong' forum threads without specific prompts/screenshots
rejected_or_weak_leads.reason: Too anecdotal; prefer specific reproducible cases with claimed outputs.

search_notes: Covered web searches on letter counts (Google, carry forward, Gemini), decimal arithmetic (9.11/9.9), word counts. X search yielded some screenshot posts. Strong coverage on character_count and arithmetic; fewer fresh negation/ordering examples. Recommend targeted follow-up searches for 'do not' constraint failures and exact list sorting if more candidates needed.
